info.title: Retrieve Credit Memo API
info.description:
Retrieves **credit memo** information associated with a specified **work order number**, keyed by **dealer account**, **work order**, and **segment**. The legacy SOAP **Retrieve Credit Memo** operation maps to this REST API; see your SOAP-to-REST field mapping and REST API FAQ attachments for property-level details.

Support: Warranty_Api_Support@JohnDeere.com

servers.description: Sandbox (cert). Production uses `https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com` — confirm the path prefix under `/digcust/wy/` and whether the `cert` segment is present for your environment.

OAuth2.description: John Deere Dealer Solutions OAuth 2.0. Use the **authorization code** flow (three-legged) for interactive users, or the **client credentials** grant for machine-to-machine access. Request the OAuth scope assigned to your application for this API (this reference uses `warranty` as an example — confirm the scope in your Developer.Deere.com application and technical documentation).

CreditMemoDetail.description: Work order / credit memo entity returned from **WorkOrderDetSet**. The exact properties depend on the OData contract and your SOAP-to-REST mapping; additional fields may appear.

workOrder.description: Work order number used in the lookup key.

dealerAccount.description: Dealer account identifier used in the lookup key.

segment.description: Segment code used in the lookup key.

creditMemoNumber.description: Credit memo identifier when present on the entity.

creditMemoStatus.description: High-level credit memo or processing status when returned by the service.

message.example: No credit memo was found for the supplied work order key.

get.summary: Get credit memo by dealer account, work order, and segment
get.description:
Retrieves **WorkOrderDet** entities from **WorkOrderDetSet** using the OData-style key: dealer account, work order number, and segment.

**Sandbox example:** `GET https://jdws-api-sandbox.deere.com/digcust/wy/cert/DbsRetrieveCreditMemo/WorkOrderDetSet(DealerAccount='550012345',WorkOrder='WO-2026-00012345',Segment='01')`

**Production:** Use the production host (`https://warrantyext-api-prod.deere.com`) with the path pattern documented for your program (the `cert` segment or application id may differ from sandbox).

**Accept:** `application/json`

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Application or service instance segment for your Dealer Solutions integration (sandbox example: `DbsRetrieveCreditMemo`).

parameters.name: DealerAccount
parameters.description: Dealer account identifier in the WorkOrderDetSet key.

parameters.name: WorkOrder
parameters.description: Work order number in the WorkOrderDetSet key.

parameters.name: Segment
parameters.description: Segment code in the WorkOrderDetSet key.

200.description: Credit memo / work order detail returned for the supplied key.

400.description: Bad request — malformed key or invalid parameters.

error.message: The WorkOrderDetSet key could not be parsed.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid access token.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not include the required scope or organization access.

error.message: Access token is missing the required scope.

404.description: No credit memo found for the supplied dealer account, work order, and segment.

error.message: No credit memo was found for the supplied work order key.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
